description_for_human: Read and manage the signed-in user's Outlook calendar through the WorkIQ Calendar MCP (agent365), proxied by the Probation Tracker MCP server using On-Behalf-Of.

functions.name: ListEvents
functions.description: Retrieve a list of events for the signed-in user with start/end datetimes, title, attendee emails. Returns only the master event for recurring meetings.

functions.name: ListCalendarView
functions.description: Retrieve calendar events in a window with recurring meetings expanded into individual instances. Prefer over ListEvents for day/week views.

functions.name: CreateEvent
functions.description: Create a new calendar event. Accepts attendee names or emails (names are resolved). Default duration 30 min. All events automatically get a Teams meeting link unless isAllDay=true.

functions.name: UpdateEvent
functions.description: Update an existing calendar event by ID (subject, time, attendees, body, etc.).

functions.name: DeleteEventById
functions.description: Delete a calendar event by its ID without notifying attendees.

functions.name: CancelEvent
functions.description: Cancel a calendar event as the organizer and notify all attendees.

functions.name: FindMeetingTimes
functions.description: Suggest available meeting times for the signed-in user and a list of attendees based on free/busy availability.

functions.name: AcceptEvent
functions.description: Accept a calendar event invitation. Optionally include a comment and choose whether to send a response.

functions.name: TentativelyAcceptEvent
functions.description: Tentatively accept a calendar event invitation.

functions.name: ForwardEvent
functions.description: Forward a calendar event invitation to additional recipients.

functions.name: GetRooms
functions.description: List bookable meeting rooms available to the signed-in user.

functions.name: GetUserDateAndTimeZoneSettings
functions.description: Return the signed-in user's mailbox date format and time zone (Windows TZ id).

functions.name: GetOnlineMeetingAiInsights
functions.description: Get AI-generated insights (action items, summary) for an online meeting.

functions.name: GetOnlineMeetingAttendanceReports
functions.description: Retrieve attendance reports for a past Teams online meeting.

functions.name: GetOnlineMeetingTranscripts
functions.description: Retrieve transcripts for a past Teams online meeting.
